node.content-desc: MOBILE · INDEPENDENT, not connected, HOLD TO SWITCH

node.text: What can Hermes do for you today?

node.content-desc: NEW CHAT, Start a fresh conversation, 00 ↩
PC CONTROLLER, Open apps, close windows, run commands on your desktop.
